description: Validate an already-migrated Codex target: config.toml, .agents/skills, .codex/agents, and AGENTS.md (--validate-target, read-only).
rules: validates an existing Codex target; never writes
checks config.toml, skill files, agent files, and AGENTS.md files
usage: Set TARGET (a migrated Codex root, e.g. ~/.codex/ or ./.codex/). Output: validate.txt.
limitation: Read-only validator; writes nothing. The vendored CLI imports tomllib and needs Python 3.11+ to run; on older Python it degrades to an empty report. The real CLI exits 1 on a hard validation error, but the porter degrades gracefully and stays green.
